causalAutopsy.notes: Latent O(N) write amplification in CommitmentTracker.verify(): saveStore() ran per-mutation inside the sweep, serializing the whole store each time. Harmless until the store grew large (1.6MB / 1724 commitments, 1137 terminal never pruned), at which point the 60s sweep froze the event loop for minutes. Surfaced live on Echo 2026-06-21 via a JSON.stringify tracer.
